---
title: "My Automatic Report"
author: "Christophe Bontemps"
date: "2023-08-25"
output:
  html_document:
    df_print: paged
  word_document: default
  pdf_document: default
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

# My analysis
## Data set 
I will be loading a dataset here and today we change it

```{r}
library(readxl)
df <- read.csv(file ="https://www.unsiap.or.jp/on_line/2023/TAPOS/Data/SDGperRegion.csv")
read.ex

c <- cor.test(df$population, df$surface_area, method = "kendall", alternative = "greater")

```

My data set has **`r nrow(df)`**  observations!

correlation is  **`r round(c$statistic, 2)`**
